description_long: This is a multi-tiered wooden shelving unit with a rich brown finish, featuring three main horizontal shelves and two detachable triangular side tables. The central structure is rectangular with open sides and circular cutouts at the back for cable management or ventilation. The side tables have a unique angular design, supported by diagonal braces and small feet, and can be positioned adjacent to or away from the main unit. The main shelves are supported by vertical panels and are spaced to accommodate various items, making it suitable for storage or display. The entire piece rests on small caster wheels, enhancing its mobility. The wood grain texture is visible throughout, giving it a natural and robust appearance suitable for urban interiors, garages, or offices.
description: A multi-tiered wooden shelving unit with detachable triangular side tables, visible wood grain, and caster wheels for mobility.
description_view_0: Front view showing three main shelves, two detachable triangular side tables, and circular cutouts at the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular design of the side tables and the layered structure of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open back, circular cutouts, and the alignment of the shelves and side tables.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the diagonal braces and the stacked arrangement of the shelves.
